---
title: "OSU Three-Story Pivoting Mass Timber Test"
image: ../../assets/images/about/osu-three-story-lab-2022.jpg
categories: [mass-timber, experimental, opensees]
description: "Design, cyclic testing, and numerical modeling of a three-story mass timber building with pivoting walls and buckling-restrained energy dissipators."
status: Completed
---

## Overview

As part of my MS research at [Oregon State University](https://oregonstate.edu/) with the [TallWood Design Institute](https://tallwoodinstitute.org/), I worked on the design, experimental testing, and numerical modeling of a three-story mass timber building with **pivoting mass ply panel walls** and **buckling-restrained energy dissipators** at the boundary.

Key publication: [Araújo R. et al. (2025)](https://doi.org/10.1061/JSENDH.STENG-13781), *Journal of Structural Engineering*.

## Testing videos

```{=html}
<div class="content-video">
<video controls preload="metadata" playsinline>
  <source src="/assets/videos/projects/osu-three-story-test-2022.mp4" type="video/mp4">
  Your browser does not support embedded video. <a href="/assets/videos/projects/osu-three-story-test-2022.mp4">Download the clip</a>.
</video>
<p>Cyclic testing of the three-story mass timber building, Oregon State University, November 2022.</p>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="content-video">
<video controls preload="metadata" playsinline>
  <source src="/assets/videos/projects/osu-pivoting-wall-2022.mp4" type="video/mp4">
  Your browser does not support embedded video. <a href="/assets/videos/projects/osu-pivoting-wall-2022.mp4">Download the clip</a>.
</video>
<p>Close-up of pivoting wall motion during the test, November 2022.</p>
</div>
```

## Related talks

- [2023 World Conference on Timber Engineering](/talks/wcte-2023/index.qmd)
- [2023 PEER Annual Meeting](/talks/peer-annual-meeting-2023/index.qmd)
- [12th National Conference on Earthquake Engineering (2022)](/talks/ncee-2022/index.qmd)
- [STESSA 2022](/talks/stessa-2022/index.qmd)

## Collaborators

Profs. [Barbara G. Simpson](https://www.linkedin.com/in/barbara-simpson-9255445b/), [Andre R. Barbosa](https://www.linkedin.com/in/andr%C3%A9-r-barbosa-452a6b/), and [Arijit Sinha](https://www.linkedin.com/in/arijit-sinha-99058827/) (Oregon State University); TallWood Design Institute partners.
